name: web-rivals
description: Browser-based Three.js tribute to Roblox Rivals — 1v1 movement-tech arena FPS.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run server" "npm run dev"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p client/tsconfig.json && tsc -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tools/tsconfig.json
